overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a character with pink hair walking along an elevated neon-lit walkway at night. The scene transitions from a close third-person follow to a wide aerial view revealing the futuristic cityscape with dominant teal and purple neon lighting.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a covered elevated walkway in a cyberpunk city at night. The ego character with pink hair walks forward past other pedestrians, including a woman in a white dress walking the opposite way. Neon-lit buildings glow in the background behind glass railings, while concrete overhead structures provide partial cover.

scene_state.functional_zone: open air balcony overlooking cyberpunk city district with distant skyline

events.description: camera begins pulling back and elevating from close third-person to wide aerial perspective
view opens up to reveal full balcony structure, group of characters, and distant illuminated city skyline

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk along the balcony edge as the camera pulls away to reveal the wider environment and group formation

notable_agents.action: man in white jacket with purple shirt walking alongside ego
woman in red outfit with glowing leg accents walking with the group

entered.detail: distant skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon accents against the night sky
tall palm trees visible on the balcony edge silhouetted against city lights
illuminated floors and architectural structures visible beneath the walkway level

segments.scene_description: The camera pulls back to a wide aerial view showing the group of characters walking along the illuminated balcony. The covered structure gives way to open air, revealing a sprawling cyberpunk cityscape with distant skyscrapers, palm trees, and multi-level architecture glowing with teal and purple neon lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an intimate walk along a crowded elevated path to a sweeping aerial vista of a neon-drenched metropolis. It begins behind a pink-haired character moving through a covered walkway, passing pedestrians and a woman in a white dress beneath concrete overhead structures. As the character advances, the camera pulls back and ascends, moving away from the glass railings and the immediate bustle of the crowd. The scene then opens from the sheltered corridor into the open air, revealing a sprawling cyberpunk cityscape defined by multi-level architecture and palm trees. Finally, the perspective expands into a wide shot where distant skyscrapers glow with dominant teal and purple neon lights against the night sky.
